title: Indicators for the sustainability assessment of MBR technologies for wastewater reuse in Chile
author: Rodríguez-Castillo, Bolívar-Paypay, et al.

steps.title: Discussion: critical analysis to assess the sustainability of a wastewater reuse project in Chile
steps.instruction: In the following sections we discuss the advantages or useful aspects (the good), the difficulties and challenges (the bad), and absolute barriers (the ugly) to the application of the rules and indicators established in Tables 1 to 3, for the use of ICoS to assess this problem.
